strengths: 15+ years of fullstack experience with strong TypeScript/Node.js and React product work (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Current hands-on AI agent development, including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — a rare exact match for the AI requirement
Deep testing culture: TDD practitioner, authored test frameworks, ran testing workshops; aligns with the code-quality and review responsibilities
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed, a core framework in the primary stack
Kotlin and Python are absent from the skill set; Java experience appears dated and secondary
Significant career investment in DLang, a niche ecosystem; recent stack depth in Vitest/Playwright is not explicitly evidenced
response.justification: The candidate substantially exceeds the 6+ years requirement, with a decade and a half spanning backend, frontend, mobile, and infrastructure. Core stack alignment is strong (TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes, Git), and current AI-agent and MCP tooling work directly matches an unusual required skill. The testing and craftsmanship background (TDD, CI/CD, authored assertion libraries and test runners) fits the quality-focused responsibilities well. Gaps are framework-level rather than fundamental: Nest.js is unlisted but easily learnable given the Node.js depth, and Kotlin/Python absence is a secondary concern. Overall this is a strong fit warranting an interview.
